title: xyris cuatrecasasiana
intro: Xyris cuatrecasasiana, also known as Cuatrecasas' yellow-eyed grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. Xyris cuatrecasasasiana is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. In herbal preparations, Xyris cuatrecasasiana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
